name: Counterspell

castingTime.unit: reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 60 feet of you casting a spell

rulesText.description: Lets Capella interrupt magic that would pin, reveal, banish, or burst her down before the body horror engine gets rolling.

mechanics.label: Interrupt
mechanics.description: The target spell fails if your interruption succeeds.

mechanics.label: Upcast
mechanics.description: Higher-level slots can shut down equal-or-lower spells.

desc: Lets Capella interrupt magic that would pin, reveal, banish, or burst her down before the body horror engine gets rolling.
